name: FrontierScience-Olympiad
short_description: Per-source tag for tasks and assets sourced from the FrontierScience-Olympiad benchmark.
detailed_description: Tags any annotation, experiment, or analysis that operates on FrontierScience-Olympiad problems. FrontierScience-Olympiad supplies the project's top-of-hierarchy strategic-planning material. Use this category for stratified per-source breakdowns and for filtering paper or dataset assets that originate from this benchmark.
